# Automated Financial Analysis Report
**Company:** Illustrative UK FMCG Distribution Business
**Period:** FY2022A – FY2026E
**Generated by:** `generate_report.py` (Python, pandas, matplotlib)

---

## Executive Summary

Over the 5-year period, revenue grew from £9,800K to £13,750K
(40.3% cumulative growth), while net margin expanded from
8.1% to 14.7%. The business has consistently converted
83% of net income into free cash flow on average, indicating high earnings quality.

## Key Ratios (FY2026E)

| Metric | Value | Trend vs FY2022A |
|---|---|---|
| Gross Margin | 39.0% | +4.0pp |
| Net Margin | 14.7% | +6.6pp |
| ROE | 33.4% | +9.3pp |
| Current Ratio | 1.35x | +0.51x |
| Debt-to-Equity | 0.59x | -0.60x |
| Cash Conversion Cycle | 38 days | -2 days |

## Cash Flow Highlights (FY2026E)
- Operating Cash Flow: £2,050K
- Free Cash Flow: £1,610K
- FCF Margin: 11.7%
- Cash Balance: £2,100K

## Key Insight
The current ratio crossed above 1.0x in FY2024A,
marking a shift from a working-capital-constrained to a working-capital-healthy position —
consistent with the improving cash conversion cycle and falling leverage over the same period.
